subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth with demonic jaws and claws who appears as a handsome half-elf to those without magical sight.
source_quote: A seven-foot-tall Yugoloth with demonic jaws and claws, though he appears as a handsome, chic half-elf to those without magical sight

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass holds the drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: He holds the drow prisoner Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass has a long-standing interest in Felkur stemming from a stolen item.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur.
source_quote: Maram il Vass explains he has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass proposed a deal to Felkur to retrieve a specific magical item in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location.
source_quote: Maram il Vass proposes a deal to Felkur: retrieve a specific magical item for him, which he owes to another demon, in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass expressed admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills.
source_quote: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully added a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve.
source_quote: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur secured a 'no-betrayal' clause making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse.
source_quote: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suggested a magical binding ritual to seal the deal.
source_quote: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur received a bonus on saving throws against fear while under the contract's terms.
source_quote: The contract is finalized, granting Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a drow prisoner held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: A drow prisoner held by Maram il Vass in the Hanging Gardens

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was acquired from fire giants.
source_quote: acquired from fire giants

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: The party successfully retrieved Xaven Tanor'this from a hanging cage.
source_quote: The party successfully retrieves him from a hanging cage in the cavern

subject: Daein
fact: Daein provided bardic inspiration to Felkur during the negotiation.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation

subject: Daein
fact: Daein shouted for the drow prisoner during the battle.
source_quote: Daein prepares an attack and shouts for the drow prisoner

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used his sap ability to cause disadvantage on a Chasme Demon's attack against Akritas.
source_quote: misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Toll the Dead on one Chasme Demon.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Spiritual Weapon near another Chasme Demon.
source_quote: and Spiritual Weapon near another

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim used his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage.
source_quote: Bramgrim uses his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas attacked a Chasme Demon with her bow and cast Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: Akritas attacks a Chasme Demon with her bow and casts Hunter's Mark

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas moved back and attacked with her bow, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear attacked a Chasme Demon with its claws, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: the Owlbear attacks it with its claws, dealing significant damage

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear grabbed the chain and prepared to lower the prisoner Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The Owlbear grabs the chain and prepares to lower the prisoner, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Chasme Demons are intelligent taskmasters and interrogators from the Abyss who serve to punish deserters from the Blood War.
source_quote: Chasme Demons are intelligent taskmasters and interrogators from the Abyss who serve to punish deserters from the Blood War

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Chasme Demons have magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, and immunity to poison.
source_quote: magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The droning sound of Chasme Demons causes necrotic damage.
source_quote: their droning sound causing necrotic damage

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: One Chasme Demon was defeated and dissolved.
source_quote: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunted Bramgrim.
source_quote: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunted Akritas.
source_quote: The other Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Akritas

subject: Hags
fact: Three hags arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners after the party's escape.
source_quote: Three hags who arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners after the party's escape

subject: Maram il Vass's Office
fact: Maram il Vass's office is an opulent chamber filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures.
source_quote: An opulent chamber within Maram il Vass's palace, filled with expensive incense, tapestries, exotic flowers, and containers holding unusual creatures

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: The Empty Storage Room is adjacent to Maram il Vass's office and contains shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels.
source_quote: A room adjacent to Maram il Vass's office, containing shelves with empty bottles, vials, casks, boxes, crates, and barrels

subject: Empty Storage Room
fact: A staircase in the Empty Storage Room leads downwards to the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: and a staircase leading downwards to the Hanging Gardens

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: The Hanging Gardens is a vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall and lit by luminescent fungus.
source_quote: A vast cavern beneath Maram il Vass's palace, 100 feet tall and lit by luminescent fungus that creates an eerie pale illumination

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Heavy chains run the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages.
source_quote: Heavy chains run the length of the cavern from floor to ceiling, suspending numerous cages

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: An unusual buzzing sound echoes throughout the area

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Maram il Vass mentioned Hillsfar as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed.
source_quote: A location mentioned by Maram il Vass as a place where Graz'zt's Chosen was rumored to have been killed

subject: Armor Sets
fact: Two sets of armor were magically created by Felkur and last for eight hours.
source_quote: Two sets of armor magically created by Felkur using his abilities, lasting for eight hours

subject: Armor Sets
fact: The party fabricated the origin of the armor sets, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle.
source_quote: The party fabricated their origin, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle

subject: Armor Sets
fact: The armor sets were presented as payment for the drow prisoner.
source_quote: They were presented as payment for the drow prisoner

subject: Key
fact: Maram il Vass gave the party a key to access the Hanging Gardens.
source_quote: A key given to the party by Maram il Vass to access the Hanging Gardens where the drow prisoner is held

subject: Key
fact: The party took the key after Maram il Vass unlocked the door and left.
source_quote: The party takes it after Maram il Vass unlocks the door and leaves

subject: Chains
fact: Large, heavy chains run the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern, from which numerous cages are suspended.
source_quote: Large, heavy chains running the length of the Hanging Gardens cavern, from which numerous cages are suspended

subject: Chains
fact: One chain was broken by Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon to free Xaven Tanor'this's cage.
source_quote: One chain was broken by Bramgrim's Spiritual Weapon to free Xaven Tanor'this's cage

subject: Magical Item
fact: Maram il Vass desires an item of 'no material consequence' and tasks Felkur with retrieving it.
source_quote: An item of 'no material consequence' that Maram il Vass desires and tasks Felkur with retrieving

subject: Contract
fact: The contract is a magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures.
source_quote: A magically created, boilerplate document with numerous clauses and signatures

subject: Contract
fact: The contract includes a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement.
source_quote: a 'no-betrayal' clause that would curse Maram il Vass if he broke the agreement

subject: Party reappearance
fact: The party reappeared in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The party reappears in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Demon encounter report
fact: The party informed Maram il Vass that one demon was killed.
source_quote: The party informs Maram il Vass that one demon was killed

subject: Contract negotiation
fact: Felkur engaged in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract

subject: Contract finalization
fact: The contract was finalized.
source_quote: The contract is finalized

subject: Chasme appearance
fact: Two Chasme Demons appeared in the cavern.
source_quote: Two Chasme Demons appear

subject: Felkur Firebolt
fact: Felkur cast Firebolt, dealing fire damage to a demon which was halved due to its resistance.
source_quote: Felkur casts Firebolt, dealing fire damage to a demon, which is halved due to its resistance

subject: Owlbear attack
fact: The Owlbear attacked a Chasme Demon with its claws, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: the Owlbear attacks it with its claws, dealing significant damage

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed

subject: Chain broken
fact: Bramgrim used his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage.
source_quote: Bramgrim uses his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage

subject: Owlbear lowers prisoner
fact: The Owlbear grabbed the chain and prepared to lower the prisoner Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The Owlbear grabs the chain and prepares to lower the prisoner, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Daein attack
fact: Daein attacked a Chasme Demon with his longsword, dealing damage and using Action Surge for additional attacks.
source_quote: Daein attacks a Chasme Demon with his longsword, dealing damage and using Action Surge for additional attacks

subject: Akritas attack
fact: Akritas moved back and attacked with her bow, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage

subject: First Chasme defeat
fact: One Chasme Demon was defeated and dissolved.
source_quote: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves

subject: Chasme taunt to Bramgrim
fact: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunted Bramgrim.
source_quote: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'

subject: Chasme taunt to Akritas
fact: The other Chasme Demon telepathically taunted Akritas.
source_quote: The other Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'

subject: Chasme attack on Akritas
fact: The Chasme Demon attempted to attack Akritas but missed due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability.
source_quote: The Chasme Demon attempts to attack Akritas but misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability

subject: Magical item retrieval
fact: Felkur must retrieve a specific magical item for Maram il Vass.
source_quote: retrieve a specific magical item for him

subject: Felkur's location
fact: Maram il Vass will reveal Felkur's location unless a new agreement is made.
source_quote: will reveal Felkur's location unless a new agreement is made
